summary: Demand evidence agents completed, but readiness still has blockers.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand router schema readiness must block PRD readiness when any evidence agent reports missing evidence, clarify, block, or failed status.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Evidence missing and clarify recommendations become blockers and cannot produce prd_ready true.
risks: A PRD could be generated from incomplete evidence if missing fields are ignored.

agent_results.claim: The YOLO demand router schema readiness correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, or failed statuses, as verified by existing tests in router.ts.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues function creates blockers for missing, clarify, block, and failed statuses
evidence.why: This is the core logic that converts evidence agent issues into PRD blockers. Line 496 creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0. Line 503 creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED for clarify/block recommendations.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each evidence agent result and adds all issues to blockers
evidence.why: This integration ensures that every blocker from evidenceResultBlockingIssues is added to the blockerList, which determines prd_ready.

evidence.summary: prd_ready is set to blockers.length === 0, meaning any blocker prevents PRD readiness
evidence.why: This is the final gate that ensures prd_ready is false when any evidence agent has reported missing, clarify, block, or failed status.

evidence.summary: Test verifies that missing evidence and clarify recommendations block PRD readiness
evidence.why: This test confirms the current implementation blocks PRD readiness when cross-checker returns missing array and recommendation: 'clarify'. Lines 350-352 assert prd_ready === false and check for EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers.

evidence.summary: Evidence dispatch calls inspectDemandPrdReadiness with agent results and forces prd_ready false if boundary violations occur
evidence.why: This shows how evidence-dispatch uses inspectDemandPrdReadiness and enforces prd_ready === false when blockers exist.

assumptions: The demand description may be confirming existing behavior rather than reporting a bug, as the current implementation already blocks PRD readiness for these cases
The demand may be motivated by wanting explicit verification or documentation that this blocking behavior is working correctly
risks: If this claim is wrong, PRDs could be generated from incomplete evidence when they should be blocked
Missing evidence could be treated as optional and not block PRD generation as intended

result.notes: Current implementation in router.ts correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing, clarify, block, or failed statuses. The evidenceResultBlockingIssues function (lines 481-510) creates appropriate blockers, inspectDemandPrdReadiness (lines 717-732) adds them to the blocker list, and prd_ready (line 756) is set to false when blockers.length > 0. Test at lines 313-353 verifies this behavior.

agent_results.claim: Independent cross-check confirms the YOLO demand router schema readiness correctly blocks PRD readiness when evidence agents report missing evidence, clarify recommendations, block recommendations, or failed statuses. All explorer claims are verified by independent source file reads.

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING blocker when missing.length > 0
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms lines 496-502 create blocker for unresolved missing evidence items

evidence.summary: evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED or EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED for clarify/block recommendations and failed statuses
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms lines 503-509 handle clarify recommendations (EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED) and blocked/block/failed/error verdicts and statuses (EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED)

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each agent result and spreads issues into blockerList
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms line 727 calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues and adds all returned issues to blockers

evidence.summary: prd_ready set to blockers.length === 0, ensuring any blocker prevents PRD readiness
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms final gate at line 756 prevents prd_ready when blockers exist

evidence.summary: Test case with missing array and clarify recommendation in cross-checker result
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms test provides cross-checker with missing: ['Need product owner confirmation...'] and recommendation: 'clarify'

evidence.summary: Test assertions verify prd_ready false and presence of EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING and EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms test asserts prd_ready === false and checks for both expected blocker codes

evidence.summary: Evidence dispatch calls inspectDemandPrdReadiness with agent_results and passes through session and triage context
evidence.why: Independent verification confirms integration between evidence-dispatch and router readiness inspection

risks: If independent verification had found discrepancies between claimed behavior and actual implementation, PRDs could be incorrectly blocked or allowed

result.notes: Cross-check independently verified all explorer claims by reading source files. The evidenceResultBlockingIssues function correctly creates blockers for missing evidence (EVIDENCE_AGENT_MISSING), clarify recommendations (EVIDENCE_AGENT_CLARIFICATION_REQUIRED), and block/failed statuses (EVIDENCE_AGENT_BLOCKED). The inspectDemandPrdReadiness function calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues for each agent result and adds all issues to the blocker list. The prd_ready flag is set to blockers.length === 0, ensuring any evidence agent blocker prevents PRD generation. The existing test at lines 313-353 verifies this blocking behavior with missing evidence and clarify recommendation scenarios.

agent_results.claim: Verification confirms that no assumption is presented as fact. Both explorer and cross-checker independently verified project facts from actual source files and tests. All evidence paths are valid and point to existing project files. No unresolved missing data remains; the blocking behavior is well-documented in code and tests.

evidence.summary: Explorer and cross-checker both verified evidenceResultBlockingIssues creates blockers for missing, clarify, block, and failed statuses
evidence.why: Two independent agent reads confirm the same function implements blocking logic

evidence.summary: Both agents verified inspectDemandPrdReadiness calls evidenceResultBlockingIssues and adds issues to blockers
evidence.why: Cross-validated integration between evidence blocking and readiness inspection

evidence.summary: Both agents verified prd_ready equals blockers.length === 0, ensuring any blocker prevents PRD generation
evidence.why: Final gate cross-verified by independent reads

evidence.summary: Both agents verified test confirms blocking behavior for missing evidence and clarify recommendations
evidence.why: Test coverage independently verified by both agents

evidence.summary: Both agents verified evidence-dispatch calls inspectDemandPrdReadiness and enforces prd_ready false when blockers exist
evidence.why: Integration cross-verified by independent agent reads

result.notes: Explorer and cross-checker independently verified all claims from actual project source files and tests. No assumptions were presented as facts. All evidence paths are valid and exist in the project. No missing data remains unresolved. The demand confirms existing working behavior: evidence agents reporting missing, clarify, block, or failed statuses correctly block PRD readiness.
